instruction {
  name: "parameter::movi_lower"
  bundle {
    alu {
      opcode: MOV
      imm: true
      dst: 1
      src_immediate: 0
    }
  }
  meta {
    desc: BASE_ADDRESS_PARAMETER
    position: LOWER_32BIT
  }
}
instruction {
  name: "parameter::movi_upper"
  bundle {
    alu {
      opcode: MOV

      dst: 0
      src_immediate: 0
    }
  }
  meta {
    desc: BASE_ADDRESS_PARAMETER
    position: UPPER_32BIT
  }
}

  name: "scratch::movi_lower"

    }

    desc: BASE_ADDRESS_SCRATCH

}

instruction {
  tag: 3
  name: "input::StoreImmediate"
  overwrite_info {
    base_address_source: 0
    multicast_bitmap_source: 0
    overwrite_multicast_bitmap: false
  }
  dma_op {
    opcode: MESH
    write_tensor_traversal {
      base_address: 128
      counter {
        name: "z"
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: true
      }
      counter {
        name: "x"
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: true
      }
      counter {
        name: "y"
        end: 0
        step: 4
        mask: true
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      sync_producer {
        increment: false
        sync_flag_loop_depth: 0
      }
      double_buffer_loop: 0
      second_buffer_offset: 0
      initialize_in_pong_state: false
      alternate_inner_limit: 0
      alternate_limit_loop_id: 0
    }
    use_alternate_base_address: INSTRUCTION
    mesh {
      direction: OUTBOUND_NORTH_INBOUND_SOUTH
      zero_pad: true
      zero_pad_value: 1
    }
  }
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: true

  debug {
    layer_name: ""
    layer_type: GENERIC
    input_type: CONSTANT
    output_type: CONSTANT
    operation_type: CONSTANT_INITIALIZATION
  }
}

instruction {
  tag: 8
  name: "input::NMtoWM"
  overwrite_info {
    base_address_source: 0
    multicast_bitmap_source: 0
    overwrite_multicast_bitmap: false
  }
  dma_op {
    opcode: NARROW_TO_WIDE
    read_tensor_traversal {
      base_address: 128
      counter {
        name: "partial"
        end: 3
        step: 1
        mask: true
      }
      counter {
        name: "wm_row"
        end: 0
        step: 4
        mask: true
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      double_buffer_loop: 0
      second_buffer_offset: 0
      initialize_in_pong_state: false
      alternate_inner_limit: 0
      alternate_limit_loop_id: 0
    }
    write_tensor_traversal {
      base_address: 2
      counter {
        name: "row"
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: true
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      sync_producer {
        increment: false
        sync_flag_loop_depth: 0
      }
      double_buffer_loop: 0
      second_buffer_offset: 0
      initialize_in_pong_state: false
      alternate_inner_limit: 0
      alternate_limit_loop_id: 0
    }
    use_alternate_base_address: INSTRUCTION
    narrow_wide {
      transpose: false
      double_operand_mode: false
      wide_memory_load_store_loop_id: 1
    }
  }
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: true

        end: 11

        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        name: "y"
        end: 11
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      sync_producer {
        increment: false
        sync_flag_loop_depth: 0
      }
      double_buffer_loop: 0
      second_buffer_offset: 0
      initialize_in_pong_state: false
      alternate_inner_limit: 0
      alternate_limit_loop_id: 0
    }
    wide_memory_read_for_sums {
      base_address: 0
      counter {
        name: "zi"
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        name: "zzi"
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        name: "outer_zzi"
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        name: "x_out"
        end: 11
        step: 1

      }
      counter {
        name: "y_out"
        end: 11
        step: 1

      counter {

      counter {

      second_buffer_offset: 4

      alternate_inner_limit: 0
      alternate_limit_loop_id: 0

    sync_watchers {
      sync_flag_id {
        tile_sync_flag_id: TILE_WIDE_TO_NARROW
      }
      sync_flag_loop_depth: 3
      initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 50
      wait_sync_flag_stride: 50
      sync_wait_valid: true

    linear {
      opcode: MAC
      activation_width_bytes: 1
      parameter_width_bytes: 1
      cell_group_mode: MULTI_FEATURE
      mac_disable: NONE
      partial_sum_wrap_around: false
      zero_activation_power_save: false
      zero_bias_init: true
      partial_sum_writeback_disable: true

      opcode: RELU

      immediate_bias: 0
      high_clip_value: 4.2949673e+09
      low_clip_value: 0
      non_linear_bitwidth_bytes: 1
      non_linear_offset: 0
      use_scales: false
      apply_bias: false
      symmetric_function: false
      even_odd_function: false
    }
    z_out_block_loop_depth: 4
    last_z_out_block_valid_count: 4
    default_z_out_block_valid_count: 4
    partial_sum_reuse_map: 1
    hiccup_enable: false
    hiccup_duration: 0
    hiccup_duty_cycle: 0

instruction {
  tag: 15
  name: "input::WideToNarrowForImageSlicing"
  overwrite_info {
    base_address_source: 0
    multicast_bitmap_source: 0
    overwrite_multicast_bitmap: false
  }
  dma_op {
    opcode: WIDE_TO_NARROW
    read_tensor_traversal {
      base_address: 0
      counter {
        name: "wm_row"
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: true
      }
      counter {
        name: "buffer"
        end: 10
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      double_buffer_loop: 1
      second_buffer_offset: 1
      initialize_in_pong_state: false
      alternate_inner_limit: 0
      alternate_limit_loop_id: 0
    }
    write_tensor_traversal {
      base_address: 0
      counter {
        name: "nm_row"
        end: 49
        step: 1
        mask: true
      }
      counter {
        name: "buffer"
        end: 13
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      sync_producer {
        increment: true
        sync_flag_loop_depth: 0
      }
      double_buffer_loop: 1
      second_buffer_offset: 64
      initialize_in_pong_state: false
      alternate_inner_limit: 53
      alternate_limit_loop_id: 1
    }
    read_sync_watchers {
      sync_flag_id {
        tile_sync_flag_id: TILE_RING_BUS_READ_A
      }
      sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
      initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 1
      wait_sync_flag_stride: 1
      sync_wait_valid: true
      stall_ttu_id: 0
    }
    write_sync_watchers {
      sync_flag_id {
        tile_sync_flag_id: TILE_ACTIVATION_WRITE
      }
      sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
      initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 65535
      wait_sync_flag_stride: 1
      sync_wait_valid: true
      stall_ttu_id: 1
    }
    use_alternate_base_address: INSTRUCTION
    narrow_wide {
      transpose: false
      double_operand_mode: false
      wide_memory_load_store_loop_id: 3
      is_scaling_factor_bias: false
    }
  }
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  debug {
    layer_name: "input"
    layer_type: INPUT
    input_type: ACTIVATION
    output_type: ACTIVATION
    operation_type: DATA_TRANSFER
  }
}
instruction {
  tag: 16
  name: "input::WideToNarrowForImageSlicing"
  overwrite_info {
    base_address_source: 0
    multicast_bitmap_source: 0
    overwrite_multicast_bitmap: false
  }
  dma_op {
    opcode: WIDE_TO_NARROW
    read_tensor_traversal {
      base_address: 0
      counter {
        name: "wm_row"
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: true
      }
      counter {
        name: "buffer"
        end: 10
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      double_buffer_loop: 1
      second_buffer_offset: 1
      initialize_in_pong_state: false
      alternate_inner_limit: 0
      alternate_limit_loop_id: 0
    }
    write_tensor_traversal {
      base_address: 0
      counter {
        name: "nm_row"
        end: 49
        step: 1
        mask: true
      }
      counter {
        name: "buffer"
        end: 13
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      sync_producer {
        increment: true
        sync_flag_loop_depth: 0
      }
      double_buffer_loop: 1
      second_buffer_offset: 64
      initialize_in_pong_state: false
      alternate_inner_limit: 40
      alternate_limit_loop_id: 1
      prologue {
        loop_id: 2
        base_address: 0
        inner_limit: 12
        outer_limit: 12
        outer_stride: 0
      }
    }
    read_sync_watchers {
      sync_flag_id {
        tile_sync_flag_id: TILE_RING_BUS_READ_A
      }
      sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
      initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 1
      wait_sync_flag_stride: 1
      sync_wait_valid: true
      stall_ttu_id: 0
    }
    write_sync_watchers {
      sync_flag_id {
        tile_sync_flag_id: TILE_ACTIVATION_WRITE
      }
      sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
      initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 65535
      wait_sync_flag_stride: 1
      sync_wait_valid: true
      stall_ttu_id: 1
    }
    use_alternate_base_address: INSTRUCTION
    narrow_wide {
      transpose: false
      double_operand_mode: false
      wide_memory_load_store_loop_id: 3
      is_scaling_factor_bias: false
    }
  }
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false
  debug {
    layer_name: "input"
    layer_type: INPUT
    input_type: ACTIVATION
    output_type: ACTIVATION
    operation_type: DATA_TRANSFER
  }
}
instruction {
  tag: 17
  name: "input::WideToNarrowForImageSlicing"
  overwrite_info {
    base_address_source: 0
    multicast_bitmap_source: 0
    overwrite_multicast_bitmap: false
  }
  dma_op {
    opcode: WIDE_TO_NARROW
    read_tensor_traversal {
      base_address: 0
      counter {
        name: "wm_row"
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: true
      }
      counter {
        name: "buffer"
        end: 10
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false

      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false

      double_buffer_loop: 1
      second_buffer_offset: 1

      alternate_limit_loop_id: 0

      base_address: 0

        name: "nm_row"
        end: 49
        step: 1
        mask: true

        name: "buffer"
        end: 13
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1

      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }

        end: 0
        step: 1

        increment: true

      second_buffer_offset: 64
      initialize_in_pong_state: false
      alternate_inner_limit: 28
      alternate_limit_loop_id: 1

        loop_id: 2

      initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 65535
      wait_sync_flag_stride: 1
      sync_wait_valid: true
      stall_ttu_id: 1

      transpose: false

      is_scaling_factor_bias: false

  tag: 18

    multicast_bitmap_source: 0

  }

        name: "wm_row"

        mask: true

        step: 1

instruction {
  tag: 23
  name: "input::RingToWide"
  overwrite_info {
    base_address_source: 0
    multicast_bitmap_source: 0
    overwrite_multicast_bitmap: false
  }
  dma_op {
    opcode: RING_BUS_CONSUMER_A
    write_tensor_traversal {
      base_address: 0

        name: "row"
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: true

      counter {
        name: "double_buffer"
        end: 10
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0

        mask: false

      sync_producer {
        increment: true

      double_buffer_loop: 1
      second_buffer_offset: 1

      base_address: 0

      sync_flag_id {
        tile_sync_flag_id: TILE_WIDE_TO_NARROW

      sync_flag_loop_depth: 3
      initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 613
      wait_sync_flag_stride: 50
      sync_wait_valid: true
    }
    linear {
      opcode: MAC
      activation_width_bytes: 1
      parameter_width_bytes: 1
      cell_group_mode: MULTI_FEATURE
      mac_disable: NONE
      partial_sum_wrap_around: false
      zero_activation_power_save: false
      zero_bias_init: true
      partial_sum_writeback_disable: true

      activation_zero_point: 0
      parameter_zero_point: 0
      zero_point_base_address: 0
      zero_point_stride: 0
      zero_point_limit: 0
      use_alternate_base_address: INSTRUCTION
    }
    non_linear {
      opcode: RELU
      activation_pipeline_scale: 1
      immediate_bias: 0
      high_clip_value: 4.2949673e+09
      low_clip_value: 0
      non_linear_bitwidth_bytes: 1
      non_linear_offset: 0
      use_scales: false
      apply_bias: false
      symmetric_function: false
      even_odd_function: false
    }
    z_out_block_loop_depth: 4
    last_z_out_block_valid_count: 4
    default_z_out_block_valid_count: 4
    partial_sum_reuse_map: 1
    hiccup_enable: false
    hiccup_duration: 0
    hiccup_duty_cycle: 0
  }
  multicast_bitmap: true

    layer_name: "input"

  tag: 31

      counter {
        name: "z_out"
        end: 1
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      sync_producer {
        increment: false
        sync_flag_loop_depth: 0
      }
      double_buffer_loop: 4
      second_buffer_offset: 4
      initialize_in_pong_state: false
      alternate_inner_limit: 0
      alternate_limit_loop_id: 0
    }
    sync_watchers {
      sync_flag_id {
        tile_sync_flag_id: TILE_RING_BUS_READ_A
      }
      sync_flag_loop_depth: 6
      initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 1
      wait_sync_flag_stride: 1
      sync_wait_valid: true
    }
    sync_watchers {
      sync_flag_id {
        tile_sync_flag_id: TILE_WIDE_TO_SCALING
      }
      sync_flag_loop_depth: 6
      initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 1
      wait_sync_flag_stride: 1
      sync_wait_valid: true
    }
    linear {
      opcode: MAC
      activation_width_bytes: 1
      parameter_width_bytes: 1
      cell_group_mode: MULTI_FEATURE
      mac_disable: NONE
      partial_sum_wrap_around: false
      zero_activation_power_save: false
      zero_bias_init: true
      partial_sum_writeback_disable: true
      load_parameter_zero_point: false
      activation_zero_point: 0
      parameter_zero_point: 128
      zero_point_base_address: 0
      zero_point_stride: 0
      zero_point_limit: 0
      use_alternate_base_address: INSTRUCTION
    }
    non_linear {
      opcode: RELU
      activation_pipeline_scale: 0.007843138
      immediate_bias: 0
      high_clip_value: 255
      low_clip_value: 0
      non_linear_bitwidth_bytes: 1
      non_linear_offset: 0
      use_scales: false
      apply_bias: true
      symmetric_function: false
      even_odd_function: false
    }
    z_out_block_loop_depth: 6
    last_z_out_block_valid_count: 56
    default_z_out_block_valid_count: 64
    partial_sum_reuse_map: 7
    hiccup_enable: false
    hiccup_duration: 0
    hiccup_duty_cycle: 0
  }
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: true
  multicast_bitmap: false
  multicast_bitmap: false

    layer_name: "conv_compute"
    layer_type: CONVOLUTION

    output_type: BIAS
    operation_type: COMPUTE

instruction {
  name: "conv_compute::DRAMToParameterMemory"
  pop_input {
    input_fifo_select: PARAMETER
    tensor_traversal {
      base_address: 0
      counter {
        name: "row"
        end: 15
        step: 1
        mask: true
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      sync_producer {
        increment: true
        sync_flag_loop_depth: 0
      }
      double_buffer_loop: 0
      second_buffer_offset: 0
      initialize_in_pong_state: false
      alternate_inner_limit: 0
      alternate_limit_loop_id: 0
    }
    sync_watchers {
      sync_flag_id {
        scalar_sync_flag_id: SCALAR_PARAMETER_INFEED
      }
      sync_flag_loop_depth: 0
      initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 0
      wait_sync_flag_stride: 1
      sync_wait_valid: true
    }
  }
  debug {
    layer_name: "conv_compute"
    layer_type: CONVOLUTION
    input_type: PARAMETER
    output_type: PARAMETER
    operation_type: DATA_TRANSFER
  }
}
instruction {
  name: "parameter::dma::is_negative"
  bundle {
    alu {
      opcode: ILT
      imm: true
      dst: 0
      srcx: 1
      src_immediate: 0
    }
  }
}
instruction {
  predicate {
    reg_src: 0
    polarity: false
  }
  name: "parameter::dma::no_carry"
  bundle {
    alu {
      opcode: INE
      imm: false
      dst: 1
      srcx: 1
      srcy: 1
    }
  }
}

  predicate {
    reg_src: 0
    polarity: true

      opcode: AND
      imm: true

      srcx: 1
      src_immediate: 2147483647
    }
  }
}

}

  predicate {
    reg_src: 1

  }
  name: "parameter::dma::add_carry"
  bundle {

instruction {
  tag: 45
  name: "conv::Output::WideToRing"
  overwrite_info {
    base_address_source: 0
    multicast_bitmap_source: 0
    overwrite_multicast_bitmap: false
  }
  dma_op {
    opcode: RING_BUS_PRODUCER
    read_tensor_traversal {
      base_address: 0
      counter {
        name: "row"
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: true
      }
      counter {
        name: "double_buffer"
        end: 79
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      sync_producer {
        increment: true
        sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
      }
      sync_producer {
        increment: true
        sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
      }
      double_buffer_loop: 1
      second_buffer_offset: 1
      initialize_in_pong_state: false
      alternate_inner_limit: 0
      alternate_limit_loop_id: 0
    }
    read_sync_watchers {
      sync_flag_id {
        tile_sync_flag_id: TILE_RING_BUS_PRODUCER_A
      }
      sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
      initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 0
      wait_sync_flag_stride: 1
      sync_wait_valid: true
      stall_ttu_id: 0
    }
    read_sync_watchers {
      sync_flag_id {
        tile_sync_flag_id: TILE_NARROW_TO_WIDE
      }
      sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
      initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 1
      wait_sync_flag_stride: 1
      sync_wait_valid: true
      stall_ttu_id: 0
    }
    use_alternate_base_address: INSTRUCTION
    ring_bus_producer {
      wide_ring_header {
        multicast_bitmap: false
        multicast_bitmap: false
        multicast_bitmap: false

        multicast_bitmap: false

        multicast_bitmap: true
      }
      consumer_id: CONSUMER_A
    }

  multicast_bitmap: true

instruction {
  tag: 46
  name: "conv::Output::WideToRing"
  overwrite_info {
    base_address_source: 0
    multicast_bitmap_source: 0
    overwrite_multicast_bitmap: false
  }
  dma_op {
    opcode: RING_BUS_PRODUCER
    read_tensor_traversal {
      base_address: 0
      counter {
        name: "row"
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: true
      }
      counter {
        name: "double_buffer"
        end: 73
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      sync_producer {
        increment: true
        sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
      }
      sync_producer {
        increment: true
        sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
      }
      double_buffer_loop: 1
      second_buffer_offset: 1
      initialize_in_pong_state: false
      alternate_inner_limit: 0
      alternate_limit_loop_id: 0
    }
    read_sync_watchers {
      sync_flag_id {
        tile_sync_flag_id: TILE_RING_BUS_PRODUCER_A
      }
      sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
      initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 80
      wait_sync_flag_stride: 1
      sync_wait_valid: true
      stall_ttu_id: 0
    }
    read_sync_watchers {
      sync_flag_id {
        tile_sync_flag_id: TILE_NARROW_TO_WIDE
      }
      sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
      initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 1
      wait_sync_flag_stride: 1
      sync_wait_valid: true
      stall_ttu_id: 0
    }
    use_alternate_base_address: INSTRUCTION
    ring_bus_producer {
      wide_ring_header {
        multicast_bitmap: false
        multicast_bitmap: false
        multicast_bitmap: false

        multicast_bitmap: true

      consumer_id: CONSUMER_A

instruction {
  tag: 53
  name: "conv::Output::WideToRing"
  overwrite_info {
    base_address_source: 0
    multicast_bitmap_source: 0
    overwrite_multicast_bitmap: false
  }
  dma_op {
    opcode: RING_BUS_PRODUCER
    read_tensor_traversal {
      base_address: 0
      counter {
        name: "row"
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: true
      }
      counter {
        name: "double_buffer"
        end: 79
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      counter {
        end: 0
        step: 1
        mask: false
      }
      sync_producer {
        increment: true
        sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
      }
      sync_producer {
        increment: true
        sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
      }
      double_buffer_loop: 1
      second_buffer_offset: 1
      initialize_in_pong_state: false
      alternate_inner_limit: 0
      alternate_limit_loop_id: 0
    }
    read_sync_watchers {
      sync_flag_id {
        tile_sync_flag_id: TILE_RING_BUS_PRODUCER_A
      }
      sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
      initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 592
      wait_sync_flag_stride: 1
      sync_wait_valid: true
      stall_ttu_id: 0
    }
    read_sync_watchers {
      sync_flag_id {
        tile_sync_flag_id: TILE_NARROW_TO_WIDE
      }
      sync_flag_loop_depth: 1
      initial_expected_sync_flag_value: 1
      wait_sync_flag_stride: 1
      sync_wait_valid: true
      stall_ttu_id: 0
    }
    use_alternate_base_address: INSTRUCTION
    ring_bus_producer {
      wide_ring_header {
        multicast_bitmap: false
        multicast_bitmap: false
        multicast_bitmap: false
        multicast_bitmap: false
        multicast_bitmap: false

}
instruction {
  name: "conv::dma::is_negative"
  bundle {
    alu {
      opcode: ILT
      imm: true
      dst: 0
      srcx: 5
      src_immediate: 0
    }
  }
}
instruction {
  predicate {
    reg_src: 0
    polarity: false
  }
  name: "conv::dma::no_carry"
  bundle {
    alu {
      opcode: INE
      imm: false
      dst: 1
      srcx: 5
      srcy: 5
    }
  }
}
instruction {
  predicate {
    reg_src: 0
    polarity: true
  }
  name: "conv::dma::and_31bit"
  bundle {
    alu {
      opcode: AND
      imm: true
      dst: 10
      srcx: 5
      src_immediate: 2147483647
    }
  }
}

      imm: true
      dst: 10

      src_immediate: 0
    }
  }
}

}

  name: "stdma[0]"
  bundle {
    store {
      opcode: STDMA
      memory_address: 0
      src: 6
    }
  }
}

  name: "stdma[1]"
  bundle {
    store {
      opcode: STDMA
      memory_address: 1
      src: 7
    }
    alu {
      opcode: MOV
      imm: true
      dst: 8
      src_immediate: 300000
    }
  }
}

    alu {
      opcode: MOV
      imm: true
      dst: 4
      src_immediate: 0
    }
  }

    }
  }

  name: "interrupt::dma::is_negative"
  bundle {
    alu {
      opcode: ILT
      imm: true
      dst: 0
      srcx: 5
      src_immediate: 0
    }
  }
}

  predicate {
    reg_src: 0
    polarity: false

      opcode: INE
      imm: false
      dst: 1
      srcx: 5
      srcy: 5
    }
  }
}
